title: heloniopsis breviscapa var. flavida
intro: Heloniopsis breviscapa var. flavida, also known as the yellow flowered Heliopsis, is a perennial plant species native to Asia. It is a flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating cardiovascular and digestive issues. The plant is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to lower blood pressure, reduce cholesterol levels, and protect against cell damage. Heloniopsis breviscapa var. flavida can be prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or tinctures, and is often used as a natural remedy for various health conditions due to its health benefits.
